warnings: Only certified, beginner-safe profiles and add-ons are shown in the default experience.
Generic artifacts are built without user secrets. Hostname, password, SSH, and Wi-Fi are applied locally before flashing.

bundles.label: Core Dev Tools
bundles.description: git, curl, editors, tmux, htop, and everyday shell tools.

bundles.label: Python 3
bundles.description: Python 3, pip, venv, and headers for beginner-friendly development.

bundles.label: Scientific Python
bundles.description: NumPy, SciPy, Pandas, Matplotlib, and Seaborn for data work.

bundles.label: C/C++ Toolchain
bundles.description: GCC, G++, CMake, make, pkg-config, and GDB.

bundles.label: OpenCV
bundles.description: OpenCV plus video tooling for camera and vision projects.

bundles.label: Camera Tools
bundles.description: fswebcam, GStreamer, and video utilities for USB cameras.

bundles.label: GPIO
bundles.description: Pin control libraries and Python bindings for the BBB header pins.

bundles.label: I2C and SPI
bundles.description: Tools and Python bindings for common sensor and display buses.

bundles.label: UART and Serial
bundles.description: Serial console tools and PySerial for microcontroller comms.

bundles.label: PWM and Servos
bundles.description: Servo and PWM libraries for motor and robotics projects.

bundles.label: Robot Sensor Libraries
bundles.description: Adafruit and sensor libraries for IMU, GPS, and robotics sensors.

bundles.label: Robotics Utilities
bundles.description: Terminal and USB/network helpers commonly used in robotics labs.

bundles.label: Networking Tools
bundles.description: nmap, tcpdump, traceroute, iperf3, and related diagnostics.

bundles.label: MQTT
bundles.description: Mosquitto broker and MQTT client tooling for IoT messaging.

bundles.label: SQLite
bundles.description: A lightweight local database for logs, state, and sensor data.

bundles.label: Monitoring
bundles.description: iotop, sysstat, nethogs, dstat, and process monitoring tools.

profiles.label: Beginner Starter
profiles.description: The simplest safe starting point for first-time BBB users.

profiles.label: Python Lab
profiles.description: Python, scientific libraries, and basic hardware interfaces.

profiles.label: Robotics Starter
profiles.description: A certified robotics image with sensors, PWM, and core tooling.

profiles.label: Computer Vision
profiles.description: A certified image for cameras, OpenCV, and image processing.

profiles.label: IoT and Sensors
profiles.description: Networking, MQTT, SQLite, and sensor interfaces for data projects.
